title: magnolia calophylloides
intro: Magnolia calophylloides, also known as the yellow magnolia or yellow magnolia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Magnolia calophylloides include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Magnolia calophylloides include tea infusions, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
